name: Mangrove Crab
description: An important species in mangrove forests, harvested for its rich meat.

name: Sulu Sea Bass
description: Found in the coral reefs of the Sulu Sea, this species thrives in estuaries and coastal waters.

name: Treasure Cucumber
description: Valuable for its use in traditional medicine and as a delicacy.

name: Milkfish
description: Farmed primarily in coastal ponds, this species is significant to both culture and trade.

name: Spanner Crab
description: A rare deep-sea crab, prized for its sweet, tender meat.

name: Sea Turtles
description: These endangered species use the coasts of BARMM for nesting and feeding.

name: Frigate Tuna
description: A smaller tuna species often caught in the Sulu Archipelago, vital for local food security.

name: Sumatran Sailfin Tang
description: An ornamental fish with striking fin patterns, found in the reefs of the Sulu Archipelago.

name: Giant Clams
description: Found in the coral reefs of the Sulu Archipelago, they are iconic symbols of the region’s rich marine biodiversity.
